_note: This is a reference file. The actual TenderNed workflow (ID: 4B4zpwYnmLcAF7u3) lives on the n8n server with 28 nodes. Use deploy_workflows.py to update it (adds Slack alerts + daily 07:00 schedule). The server workflow includes: TenderNed API fetch, XML/JSON parsing, CPV filtering, field splitting, and data table storage.
